Title: Classic Red Roses
Body (HTML):
A dozen long-stem red roses, hand-tied with seasonal greenery and wrapped in our signature kraft paper.

Photographed before delivery. Same-day before 2pm in 10032/10033/10034/10040.

Title: White Roses & Eucalyptus
Body (HTML): White roses with seeded eucalyptus and silver dollar — designed for weddings, sympathy, and quiet celebrations.

Title: Pink Garden Roses
Body (HTML): Soft blush garden roses with ranunculus and dusty miller. The most popular gift in the shop.

Title: Rainbow Long-Stem Roses
Body (HTML): A mixed dozen of long-stem roses in white, peach, blush, and crimson. Built for big-occasion delivery.

Title: Designer's Choice Wrapped Bouquet
Body (HTML): Tell us the occasion and we'll build an arrangement around what's freshest at the market that morning. Photographed before delivery.

Title: Mixed Seasonal Bouquet
Body (HTML): Whatever's in season — peonies in spring, dahlias in summer, ranunculus in fall, amaryllis in winter. Hand-tied and wrapped.

Title: Tropical Garden
Body (HTML): Birds of paradise, anthurium, and protea. Bold, sculptural, conversation-starting.

Title: Sympathy Standing Spray
Body (HTML): A traditional standing spray in white roses, lilies, and chrysanthemums. Hand-delivered to funeral homes throughout upper Manhattan and the Bronx.

Title: Casket Spray
Body (HTML): A traditional half-couch casket spray. We coordinate timing and placement directly with the funeral home.

Title: Sympathy Wreath
Body (HTML): A 24-inch wreath of white roses, lilies, and seasonal greens.

Title: White Phalaenopsis Orchid
Body (HTML): A double-stem white orchid in a ceramic pot. Lasts 6–10 weeks with weekly watering.

Title: Succulent Garden
Body (HTML): A low ceramic dish planted with assorted succulents. Easy care, near-impossible to kill.

Title: Birthday Brights
Body (HTML): A burst of yellow, pink, and orange — gerbera, sunflowers, and snapdragons. Built for the cake table.

Title: Día de las Madres Special
Body (HTML): Para mamá. Garden roses, peonies, and ranunculus in soft pinks and creams. Limited to the week of May 10.

Title: Subscription — Classic
Body (HTML): A fresh designer's choice bouquet every two weeks, hand-delivered. Cancel anytime.

Title: Subscription — Seasonal
Body (HTML): A weekly bouquet built around what's freshest. Designer-curated, photo-confirmed every Friday.

Title: Subscription — Luxe
Body (HTML): Our largest weekly subscription — premium bouquet with garden roses, peonies, or whatever's most extraordinary that week.

Title: Add-on — Premium Glass Vase
Body (HTML): Upgrade your bouquet with a clean-line glass vase. Filled and ready to go.

Title: Add-on — Apothèque-style Candle
Body (HTML): A clean-burning soy candle in a frosted glass vessel. 60-hour burn time.

Title: Add-on — Box of Chocolates
Body (HTML): A 12-piece box of chocolate truffles from a local chocolatier.

Title: Add-on — Mylar Balloon
Body (HTML): A single mylar balloon — Happy Birthday, Congratulations, Get Well, or It's a Boy/Girl. Tell us in the order notes.

Title: Add-on — Plush Teddy
Body (HTML): A 12-inch cream plush teddy bear. Pairs well with new-baby and birthday arrangements.

Title: Add-on — Handwritten Card
Body (HTML): A hand-lettered card with your message, written by a designer at the shop.
